description: Default capability set for the main window. Grants the IPC core surface plus the Tauri plugins used by Contracts 15 (dialog: native save/open) and 16 (updater: signed update check + explicit-apply). The updater plugin is registered globally so the IPC can check for updates; applying an update still requires the explicit `download-and-install` call gated by an in-app user action (notify-only — Contract 16 §Constraints).
